name: Loom MCP
description: AST-aware code-context compiler. Symbol-level retrieval, semantic search, and impact analysis over a local code index. NOTE: Despite the name, this is the muhnehh/loom-mcp code-context server, not the Loom video platform. Tool input schemas below are reasonable best-effort approximations from the published documentation; consult the live MCP server's tools/list for exact field names.

compilerHints.semanticContext: All tools in this set query a local AST-indexed code workspace for symbols, dependencies, and structural information. They are read-only, code-aware, and operate offline against an indexed repository.

tools.name: loom_get_topology
tools.description: Return a skeleton representation of the indexed codebase: directories, files, and top-level symbols.

repo.description: Repository identifier (defaults to the active workspace).

format.description: Wire format. 'auto' switches to compact when ≥15% byte savings are projected.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Bird's-eye structural overview of a codebase.

tools.name: loom_index_folder
tools.description: Index a local directory into the Loom workspace, parsing source files with tree-sitter and extracting symbols.

path.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to index.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Build or refresh the symbol index for a directory.
aliases: scan a directory into the code index
build the symbol database for this repo

tools.name: loom_list_repos
tools.description: Enumerate repositories that have been indexed into the Loom workspace.

compilerHints.selectorHint: List indexed repositories.

tools.name: loom_search_symbols
tools.description: Search symbols (functions, classes, methods) by name with fuzzy matching.

kind.description: Filter by symbol kind (function, class, method, …).

compilerHints.selectorHint: Find a function or class by name.
aliases: search for a method named foo

tools.name: loom_bm25_search
tools.description: Rank documents/symbols using the BM25 algorithm against a free-text query.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Keyword search ranked by term frequency (BM25).
aliases: rank code by relevance to a query

tools.name: loom_fuzzy_search
tools.description: Fuzzy substring/pattern match against symbol names and file paths.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Loose pattern match on names and paths.
aliases: fuzzy find a file or symbol

tools.name: loom_search_text
tools.description: Full-text search over indexed source files.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Grep-style full-text search across the codebase.
aliases: search for a string in source files

tools.name: loom_semantic_search
tools.description: Embedding-based semantic search over symbols and code chunks (GPU-accelerated when available).

query.description: Natural-language description of the code to find.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Find code by what it does, not by name.

tools.name: loom_get_symbol
tools.description: Fetch the exact source text and location of a named symbol.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Get the source code for a single symbol.
aliases: show me the source of this function
get the implementation of a symbol

tools.name: loom_get_ranked_context
tools.description: Assemble the most-relevant code context for a query within a token budget; stops appending when budget is exhausted rather than truncating after the fact.

tokenBudget.description: Max tokens to include in the assembled context.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Token-budgeted context bundle for a query.
aliases: give me as much relevant code as fits in N tokens
build a context bundle for this question
ranked code context within a budget

tools.name: loom_focus
tools.description: Page in the complete implementation of a symbol or file, expanding from a stub or summary.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Expand a symbol or file from summary to full source.
aliases: load the complete source for this symbol

tools.name: loom_find_importers
tools.description: Reverse-dependency lookup: find every symbol or file that imports/references the target.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Find callers / importers of a symbol.

tools.name: loom_blast_radius
tools.description: Impact analysis: compute the dependency-weighted set of symbols affected by changing a target, with risk scoring.

compilerHints.selectorHint: What breaks if I change this symbol.
aliases: what would break if I rename this

tools.name: loom_find_dead_code
tools.description: Identify symbols that are defined but never referenced (unreachable from any entry point).

scope.description: Repo or path scope to analyze.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Find unreachable / unused code.

tools.name: loom_get_class_hierarchy
tools.description: Traverse the inheritance graph for a class, including ancestors and descendants.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Class inheritance / subclass tree.
aliases: what does this class inherit from

tools.name: loom_pagerank_centrality
tools.description: Rank symbols by architectural importance using PageRank over the dependency graph.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Most architecturally central symbols.
aliases: what are the most important functions

tools.name: loom_get_hotspots
tools.description: Combine cyclomatic complexity with git churn to identify high-risk hotspots.

compilerHints.selectorHint: High-complexity, high-churn code.
aliases: files that change a lot and are complex

tools.name: loom_get_changed_symbols
tools.description: Map a git diff onto the symbol graph, returning the set of symbols touched by the change.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Symbols changed by a diff.
aliases: what symbols changed in this PR

tools.name: loom_get_dependency_cycles
tools.description: Detect circular import / dependency cycles in the indexed graph.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Circular dependencies in the codebase.
aliases: do we have any dependency loops

tools.name: loom_remember
tools.description: Store a key/value note that persists across MCP sessions for cross-conversation memory.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Persist a note for a future session.
aliases: save a fact for later sessions

tools.name: loom_watch_start
tools.description: Start watching the workspace for file changes, debouncing re-index on edits.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Start filesystem watcher.

tools.name: loom_watch_stop
tools.description: Stop the workspace file watcher.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Stop filesystem watcher.

tools.name: loom_audit_agent_config
tools.description: Validate agent config files (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules) against the live symbol index, flagging stale references to renamed or deleted symbols.

path.description: Path to the config file. Defaults to autodetected CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Find stale symbol references in CLAUDE.md or .cursorrules.
aliases: audit my CLAUDE.md for stale references
check agent config for deleted symbols

tools.name: loom_plan_refactoring
tools.description: Generate edit-ready instructions for a refactor, including affected symbols, suggested order, and risk assessment.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Plan a refactor as a sequence of edits.
aliases: how should I rename this across the codebase

tools.name: loom_get_symbol_provenance
tools.description: Trace the git history of a symbol: every commit that touched it, classified by change type (creation, bugfix, refactor, feature, perf, rename, revert).

compilerHints.selectorHint: Git history of a single symbol with change classification.

tools.name: loom_get_metrics
tools.description: Return session statistics including tool call counts, token savings, and active focus budget.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Session telemetry from the Loom MCP server.
aliases: how many tokens have I saved

tools.name: loom_get_deps
tools.description: Return the dependency graph for a target symbol, file, or the whole repo.

target.description: Symbol, file, or '*' for the full graph.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Outbound dependencies of a target.

tools.name: loom_workspace_stats
tools.description: Return SQLite analytics about the indexed workspace: symbol counts, language distribution, file counts.

compilerHints.selectorHint: Aggregate stats over the indexed workspace.
